code: import React from'react';import TabPage from'../../components/common/TabPage';import{FiLayers,FiList,FiUserPlus}from'react-icons/fi';import PimEmployeeList from'./PimEmployeeList';import PimAddEmployee from'./PimAddEmployee';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const tabs=[{key:'list',label:'Employee List',icon:FiList,component:PimEmployeeList},{key:'add',label:'Add Employee',icon:FiUserPlus,component:PimAddEmployee}];const PimPage=()=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TabPage,{tabs:tabs,defaultTab:"list",moduleIcon:FiLayers,moduleTitle:"PIM"});export default PimPage;
